import React from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import { useAuth } from '../context/AuthContext'; import { formatDisplayName } from '../utils/nameFormatter'; import { gamesAPI } from '../services/api'; interface Game { _id: string; title: string; description: string; price: number; platform: string; region: string; images: string[]; availability: string; discount?: number; isNew?: boolean; } const Home: React.FC = () => { const [games, setGames] = useState([]); const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true); const [filters, setFilters] = useState({ platform: '', region: '', priceRange: 'all' }); const { state } = useAuth(); useEffect(() => { fetchGames(); }, [filters]); const fetchGames = async () => { try { const response = await gamesAPI.getGames(filters); setGames(response.data); setLoading(false); } catch (error) { console.error('Error fetching games:', error); setLoading(false); } }; return (
